description: Evidence Factory profile: read-only, six-role linear chain that turns a brief / PR / patch into an evidence pack. No mutator role, no slice fan-out. Final artifact: docs/evidence/<slug>/evidence-report.md (schema ao-operator/evidence-report/v1).
common_instructions: Treat injected artifacts as authoritative scoped context.
Return a STATUS block with Result, Artifact, Evidence, Concerns, and Blocker.
Use BLOCKED when required context, permissions, or write scope is missing.
Use BLOCKED only for this role's own inability to complete its scoped work; do not set role Result BLOCKED merely because a document describes a BLOCKED_* runtime state.
Do not write role artifact files; AO Operator reconstructs role artifacts from your STATUS block after AO completes.
This profile is read-only at the role level. No role may apply patches or write outside the declared writes scope.
Operator-level validation (AO dispatch, AO event capture, artifact hygiene) runs outside provider turns.

instructions: Classify the input as one of: pr, branch, patch, brief.
Extract scope: files changed, lines added / removed, areas of change.
Identify any sensitive fields (PII, secrets, credentials). Flag them in a sensitive-fields list.
Do not collect risks, tests, or evidence; downstream roles handle that. This role only validates intake readiness and shape.
Enumerate change risk: blast radius, regression surface, dependency exposure.
Tag each risk with severity (low / medium / high) and a one-line rationale.
Cover at least one risk per area-of-change identified by intake.
Identify which existing tests cover the change (covered list) and which gaps remain (gaps list).
Assign owners or candidate owners for each gap when context permits.
Build a test-coverage mapping table: file or symbol -> covering tests.
Gather concrete evidence: diff stats, coverage delta, prior incidents, related issues / tickets.
Cite related links (issues, prior incidents) when present in the injected context.
Do not author the final report; the report-writer role handles synthesis.
Produce a manual-QA checklist a reviewer can execute in under 30 minutes.
Every risk identified by risk-scoper must have at least one checklist item.
Every gap identified by test-mapper must have a manual mitigation step.
Render the final markdown evidence report following schema ao-operator/evidence-report/v1 (see run-artifacts/release-v0.1/mac/profile-design.md section 3d).
Do not write the deterministic replay proof artifact yourself; AO Operator executes this role's replay_command after AO completes and packs the resulting evidence-profile-deterministic-replay.json.

Include: input kind / ref, scope (files / lines / areas), risks with severity, test_coverage covered + gaps, manual_qa_checklist, related issues / incidents, verdict (shippable | needs-attention | blocked).
Verdict must be backed by the evidence collected upstream. Do not promote shippable when any high-severity risk lacks a covering test or QA item.
